lines.en:
Touch the lower screen
where something
catches your eye

Slide the lower screen
to take a good look
at the footlights

Touch the lower screen
where you think
Miki's weak spot is

Slide the lower screen
to take a good look
at the light

Touch the lower screen
on what you want
to know about

Touch the lower screen
where it won't stand up

Slide the lower screen
to face the seashell

Slide the lower screen
to move your fingertips
